name: product-ui-architect
description: Cross-project design guardrails for calm, task-first SaaS and web app interfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Design guardrails for serious product UI
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin to steer SaaS pages, app shells, dashboards, and AI workflow interfaces away from floating-card startup cliches and toward calm, structured, task-first design.
defaultPrompt: Design a calm SaaS landing page without bento features.
Refactor this dashboard into a task-first workspace.
Review this app shell for generic floating-card patterns.
